nasb.text: He said to the sons of Israel, “When your children ask their fathers in time to come, saying, ‘What are these stones?’

esv.text: And he said to the people of Israel, “When your children ask their fathers in times to come, ‘What do these stones mean?’

cnv.text: 約書亞對以色列人說：“如果日後你們的子孫問他們的父親說：‘這些石頭是甚麼意思？’

ccb.text: 并对以色列人说：“以后，你们的子孙问你们这堆石头是什么意思，
